raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.3,"R1.3":0.3,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.7,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.5","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Should the help focus on improving readability and organization, or on checking the technical and evidentiary soundness of the section?","rationale":{"R1.5":"The delegation points to help with an entire section, making section-level organization and narrative flow a central plausible responsibility.","R1.6":"A request for help with a paper section commonly implies sentence- and paragraph-level improvement of clarity, flow, and register.","RX.1":"Uncertainty must be disclosed because the delegation is underspecified and could imply different kinds of research-writing assistance.","RX.2":"Overclaim avoidance is required to prevent the projection from assuming unrequested technical validation or novelty review.","RX.3":"Scope adherence is load-bearing because the task is only to project responsibilities, not to revise or evaluate the artifact itself.","RX.4":"Downstream-harm avoidance is active because misprojecting responsibility could cause unsupported scientific or methodological changes later.","RX.5":"Provenance and traceability are required so the assigned weights remain tied to the delegation wording and artifact context."}}

parsed.clarification_question: Should the help focus on improving readability and organization, or on checking the technical and evidentiary soundness of the section?

rationale.R1.5: The delegation points to help with an entire section, making section-level organization and narrative flow a central plausible responsibility.
rationale.R1.6: A request for help with a paper section commonly implies sentence- and paragraph-level improvement of clarity, flow, and register.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty must be disclosed because the delegation is underspecified and could imply different kinds of research-writing assistance.
rationale.RX.2: Overclaim avoidance is required to prevent the projection from assuming unrequested technical validation or novelty review.
rationale.RX.3: Scope adherence is load-bearing because the task is only to project responsibilities, not to revise or evaluate the artifact itself.
rationale.RX.4: Downstream-harm avoidance is active because misprojecting responsibility could cause unsupported scientific or methodological changes later.
rationale.RX.5: Provenance and traceability are required so the assigned weights remain tied to the delegation wording and artifact context.
